images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese gravure idol embodying a vibrant Steampunk aesthetic, captured from a dramatic bottom-up shoe view angle. She wears a form-fitting, intricate lace bodysuit that accentuates her slim waist and curvy figure, the delicate fabric contrasting with industrial accessory details. She is playfully whispering a secret to her pet dog, which is sitting at her feet, creating a joyful and radiant expression. The setting is a sun-dappled forest pathway, rendered in a timeless black and white classic portrait grade that highlights the texture of her flawless skin and the lace. Bright butterfly lighting illuminates her face evenly, ensuring a professional, glamorous finish without heavy shadows. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, featuring intense depth of field, bokeh background, ray tracing, and global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
